name: AWS.Auth

unions.name: Challenge
unions.comment:
The types of challenges that Cognito can issue.

Challenge types not yet covered:

  - SmsMfa
  - SoftwareTokenMfa
  - SelectMfaType
  - MfaSetup
  - PasswordVerifier
  - CustomChallenge
  - DeviceSrpAuth
  - DevicePasswordVerifier
  - AdminNoSrpAuth

aliases.name: CognitoAPI
aliases.comment: AWS Cognito specific API for responding to challenges.

aliases.name: Config
aliases.comment: The configuration needed to interact with Cognito.
aliases.type: { clientId : String.String, userPoolId : String.String, region : AWS.Core.Service.Region }

aliases.name: Model
aliases.comment: The authentication model consisting of the evaluated config and the private state.
aliases.type: { clientId : AWS.CognitoIdentityProvider.ClientIdType, userPoolId : String.String, region : AWS.Core.Service.Region, innerModel : AWS.Auth.Private }

values.name: api
values.comment:
An extended API for working with Cognito.

This provides the functions needed to response to Cognito challenges.
values.type: AuthAPI.AuthAPI AWS.Auth.Config AWS.Auth.Model AWS.Auth.Msg AWS.Auth.Challenge AWS.Auth.CognitoAPI
